prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Performance 3.5L EcoBoost V6 (engine code: *GTDI-350*) with a closed-deck block reinforcement from *Darton Sleeves* (part #DS-350-C) and forged internals including *Manley H-beam connecting rods* (PN: 14425-8) and *JE Pistons* (PN: 364950) with a 9.5:1 compression ratio for high-boost applications. Turbo upgrade to a *Garrett GTX4509R Gen II* (84mm compressor wheel) with a *Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate* and *Precision Turbo 60mm blow-off valve* (PN: 7660). Fuel system overhaul with *Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors*, *Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump*, and *Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator* (PN: 20-0118).

Drivetrain reinforcement with a *Ford Performance 10R80 10-speed transmission* (PN: M-7006-M10R80) paired with a *PML SDrive torque converter* (stall speed: 3,200 RPM) and *South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch* (PN: SBF350-3). Transfer case upgrade to a *Quigley 4x4 Atlas II* with 4.3:1 gearing and *RuffStuff Specialties heavy-duty output shafts*. Axles replaced with *Dynatrac ProRock 60 front* and *ProRock 80 rear* with *Yukon Gear 5.38:1 ring & pinion sets* and *ARB Air Locker differentials*.

Suspension overhaul with *King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilovers* (PN: 2500-145-01) valved for 35" tires, *Currie Enterprises Antirock sway bars* (PN: CE-3010), and *Poly Performance adjustable control arms* (PN: 1100-00010) with *Currie Johnny Joints*. Braking system upgraded to *Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers* (PN: 1N3.9800.10) with *DBA 5000 Series rotors* (PN: 52920XS) and *Hawk HT-10 brake pads* (PN: HB323P.790).
estetica: Full *RTR Vehicles Bronco Spec-3* widebody kit (PN: RTR-BRONCO-SPEC3) with *RTR carbon fiber fender flares* and *RTR vented hood* (PN: RTR-BRONCO-HOOD). Front bumper replacement with *Bajak Motorsports Modular Front Bumper* (PN: BM-BRONCO-FB) featuring a *Warn Zeon 12-S winch* (PN: 103253) and *Bajak Motorsports LED light bar* (PN: BM-LED-50). Rear bumper swap to *Prinsu Designs Rear Bumper* (PN: PD-BRONCO-RB) with *RotopaX 4-gallon fuel/water cells* (PN: RX-00204-B).

Wheel setup with *Method MR701 Bead Grip wheels* (17x9, +12mm offset) wrapped in *BFGoodrich KM3 tires* (315/70R17). *Rally Innovations rock sliders* (PN: RI-BRONCO-SLIDERS) with *C4 Fab rear tire carrier* (PN: C4-BRONCO-TC) and *Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED pods* (PN: 202113). Full *PPF (Paint Protection Film) by XPEL* in *Stealth* finish with *ceramic coating* by *Gyeon Quartz*.

Interior overhaul with *Sparco Pro ADV seats* (PN: 00797-01) in *Alcantara/leather combo*, *Rollcage Industries 8-point bolt-in cage* (PN: RCI-BRONCO-8PT), *Momo Mod.78 steering wheel* (PN: 0111201111), and *Racepak IQ3 digital dash* (PN: 750-VDASH-01). Audio system upgraded to *JL Audio 12TW3 subwoofer* (PN: 12TW3-D8) with *Alpine PDX-V9 amplifier* (PN: PDX-V9) and *Focal Utopia M 3-way components* (PN: FLAX3K).
